description: Discussion on validator updates, feature activations, and governance tooling for Solana. Key topics include upcoming events, recommended software versions, and improvements in Geyser performance.
topic_summary: Validator updates and feature activations discussed, including Agave 2114 and Firedancer V300 recommendations for Mainnet. Upcoming educational workshops and governance tooling enhancements are highlighted. [t=0:08] [t=40:36] [t=354:77]
